title: QASL SENTINEL - Command Center Unificado
description: QASL NEXUS LLM | QA Leader: Elyer Gregorio Maldonado

options.content:
🛡

QASL SENTINEL - COMMAND CENTER UNIFICADO

Backend (API-SENTINEL) + Frontend (QASL-SENTINEL) | Monitoreo Unificado v2.0

Proyecto
QASL NEXUS LLM
Organizacion
QASL NEXUS LLM
Lider QA
Elyer Maldonado

panels.title: Salud Frontend (DOM)
panels.description: Estado del frontend basado en el ultimo escaneo de QASL-SENTINEL

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "status_code")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if r._value == 0 then 100.0 else if r._value == 1 then 50.0 else 0.0}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

panels.title: Puntaje General
panels.description: Promedio entre Salud Frontend y Salud Backend

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "changes")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "changes")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "confidence")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "impacted_tests")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "changes")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "confidence")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

panels.title: Codigos de Respuesta HTTP por API
Latencia por API en el Tiempo
panels.description: Evolucion de la latencia de cada endpoint (sin duplicados)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_security")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "security_status_code")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_security")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "high")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_security")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "medium")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_security")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "low")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_security")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "informational")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_security")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_security")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "high" or r._field == "medium" or r._field == "low")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_security_alert")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "risk", "alert_name"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)
  |> keep(columns: ["risk", "alert_name", "instances"])

panels.title: Historial Escaneos Frontend
panels.description: Cambios DOM y tiempo de ejecucion de cada escaneo QASL-SENTINEL

targets.query:
from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "changes")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "sentinel_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sentinel_scan")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "execution_time")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

targets.query: SELECT (sum("passed") / (sum("passed") + sum("failed"))) * 100 FROM "test_execution" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT count("duration_ms") AS "total" FROM "test_execution" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT sum("passed") AS "passed" FROM "test_execution" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT sum("failed") AS "failed" FROM "test_execution" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("duration_ms") / 1000 AS "duration" FROM "test_execution" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT sum("screenshots_count") AS "screenshots" FROM "test_execution" WHERE $timeFilter

options.content: Grabacion automatica - Ejecucion de tests en dispositivo Android

📱

QASL-MOBILE

Shift-Left Mobile Testing with AI

Motor
Maestro
Plataforma
Android
📊 Abrir Dashboard Grafana Mobile 📱 Ver Streaming en Vivo
🤖 Comandos INGRID:
"levanta mobile" | "grafana mobile"
"estado mobile" | "apaga mobile"
"reporte mobile" (email)

targets.query: SELECT "status", "duration_ms" / 1000 AS "duration_s", "passed", "failed", "screenshots_count" AS "screenshots" FROM "test_execution" WHERE $timeFilter ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 10

options.content:
